languages.text: "Госпожа Лария отправила меня просить вашего совета. О том, что делать, если оказался во временной петле".

traits.locale_text: "Госпожа Лария отправила меня просить вашего совета о временной петле".

languages.text: "Mistress Laria sent me to seek your counsel. About what to do if one is trapped in a time loop."
languages.original_text: "Госпожа Лария отправила меня просить вашего совета. О том, что делать, если оказался во временной петле".

traits.locale_text: "Mistress Laria sent me to seek your counsel. About what to do if one is trapped in a time loop."
"Mistress Laria sent me to seek your counsel. About what to do if one is trapped in a time loop."
"Mistress Laria sent me to seek your counsel. About what to do if one is trapped in a time loop."

languages.text: “菈丽雅女士派我来向你请教。如果被困在时间循环里，该怎么办。”
languages.original_text: "Mistress Laria sent me to seek your counsel. About what to do if one is trapped in a time loop."

traits.locale_text: “菈丽雅女士派我来向你请教。如果被困在时间循环里，该怎么办。”

languages.text: « Maîtresse Laria m'a {mf|envoyé|envoyée} ici pour vous demander conseil, à propos de ce qu'il faut faire si l'on est coincé dans une boucle temporelle. »
languages.original_text: "Mistress Laria sent me to seek your counsel. About what to do if one is trapped in a time loop."

traits.locale_text: « Maîtresse Laria m'a {mf|envoyé|envoyée} ici pour vous demander conseil, à propos de ce qu'il faut faire si l'on est coincé dans une boucle temporelle. »

languages.text: "Beni Laria Hanım gönderdi, tavsiyeni alabileceğimi söyledi. Bir zaman döngüsünde sıkışıp kalındığında ne yapılacağı konusunda fikrine ihtiyacım var."
languages.original_text: "Mistress Laria sent me to seek your counsel. About what to do if one is trapped in a time loop."

traits.locale_text: "Beni Laria Hanım gönderdi, tavsiyeni alabileceğimi söyledi. Bir zaman döngüsünde sıkışıp kalındığında ne yapılacağı konusunda fikrine ihtiyacım var."

languages.text: «La señora Laria me envía a pedir su consejo sobre qué hacer si alguien se encontrara atrapado en un bucle temporal».
languages.original_text: "Mistress Laria sent me to seek your counsel. About what to do if one is trapped in a time loop."

traits.locale_text: «La señora Laria me envía a pedir su consejo sobre qué hacer si alguien se encontrara atrapado en un bucle temporal».

languages.text: "Meisterin Laria schickt mich, um Rat einzuholen. Darüber, was zu tun ist, wenn man in einer Zeitschleife gefangen ist."
languages.original_text: "Mistress Laria sent me to seek your counsel. About what to do if one is trapped in a time loop."

traits.locale_text: "Meisterin Laria schickt mich, um Rat einzuholen. Darüber, was zu tun ist, wenn man in einer Zeitschleife gefangen ist."

languages.text: 「ラリア女史から、時間ループに陥った場合の対処法について、あなたの助言を求められたのです。」
languages.original_text: "Mistress Laria sent me to seek your counsel. About what to do if one is trapped in a time loop."

traits.locale_text: 「ラリア女史から、時間ループに陥った場合の対処法について、あなたの助言を求められたのです。」
